commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can preserve the PR's early-persistence behavior while moving direct CLI writes behind the existing hook approval/redaction boundary.; Needs attention: The patch can bypass the existing before_agent_run redaction boundary for direct CLI attempts.; Review finding: [P1] Keep CLI persistence behind before_agent_run approval — src/agents/command/attempt-execution.ts:700 (sha=3c81b0c971f3911bbab7bf5d19df75d1f6f8c72b)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds pre-run user-only transcript persistence for CLI and ACP attempts, routes internal session-effects writes to an internal transcript, and suppresses duplicate user rows during later transcript mirroring.

PR surface: Source +130, Tests +332. Total +462 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows the PR calls CLI persistence before `runCliAgent`, while current main's approved-turn persistence runs after `before_agent_run` and has tests proving blocked prompts are redacted.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can preserve the PR's early-persistence behavior while moving direct CLI writes behind the existing hook approval/redaction boundary.
